name: Dalmatian

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Dalmatian (dalm1243).

notes: Skeleton. Extinct Romance language of the Dalmatian coast, known chiefly from the Vegliote of its last speaker and from documentary fragments; its phonology is a scholarly reconstruction. Grapheme map uses the Latin base with Italian-like digraphs (ch/gh plain velars, gn [ɲ], gl [ʎ], sc [ʃ]) and records the diphthongs prominent in the reconstruction. Because the data are scant and normalised by editors, the values are uncertain; stress and vowel length are not reliably recoverable and are left unencoded, so a high PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Dalmatian (dalm1243)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
sources.notes: Classification reference for a skeleton-tier entry.
